name: M4A1消音版 | 澜磷
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. Multiple layers of metallic blue paint have been applied over a chrome blue base coat. Feeling blue?
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器采用多层金属质感的蓝色喷涂，表面另附上铬涂层处理。 闷闷不乐吗？
